overall.description: First-person exploration of a medieval castle terrace in a video game, featuring gothic stone architecture, conical towers, and wizard-robed students, with panoramic mountain views under partly cloudy skies.

grey stone block walls with vertical wooden paneling

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a sunlit stone terrace with gothic columns, walking past benches and potted shrubs while admiring the round tower and distant mountain range.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered stone colonnade past the glass greenhouse, approaching and entering a small domed tower structure with a spiral staircase inside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the ornate, enclosed corridors of a castle into the expansive, sunlit openness of an exterior terrace. It begins within narrow hallways featuring blue and gold vaulted ceilings, moving forward until a wooden door opens to reveal a bright stone terrace. As the camera emerges into the light, it glides past gothic columns, benches, and potted shrubs, with the view expanding to encompass a round tower and a distant mountain range. The scene then opens further into a wide plaza, passing students gathered near a central fountain and looking up toward moss-covered spires and a glass greenhouse. Finally, the camera moves through a covered stone colonnade and enters a small domed tower, shifting from the open air back into the interior of a spiral staircase.
